title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 35.  FACILITIES PROVIDING HOUSING OR TEMPORARY

RESIDENCE FOR INDIVIDUALS REFERRED BY JUDICIAL AGENCIES

§2851.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the “Judicial Agency Referral Residential Facility Regulatory Act."

Acts 2006, No. 660, §1, eff. June 29, 2006.
